No dynamic code execution or network activity is present. The plugin modifies CSS properties in a predictable way without external side effects.",
  "analysis": "The code loads 'postcss' and 'postcss-value-parser' libraries to parse and modify CSS. It defines a plugin 'transform-font-size' that traverses CSS rules, identifies 'font-size' and certain height-related properties, and updates their values using calc() functions. The 'transformFontSize' function processes CSS source code asynchronously and returns the transformed CSS. There are no signs of malicious code, obfuscated code, or data leaks. It is a straightforward CSS transformation utility.",
